sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73811" key="o(morreuste/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμορρευστέω</orth>, <sense id="n73811.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁμοῦ ῥεῖν</ref></xr>, Olymp.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0003.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.104B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.104B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
